vocab.exampleEn: Scan for names, dates, and key words.
vocab.exampleZh: 寻读姓名、日期和关键词。

cycle.summaryEn: Turn simple ideas into cleaner IELTS lines and link them smoothly.
cycle.summaryZh: 把简单意思改成更像雅思答案的表达，并把句子连起来。

meaningEn: This reading word helps you understand questions and paraphrases faster.
meaningZh: 这个阅读词可以帮助你更快看懂题目和改写。
sourceEn: This lesson is auto-picked from the word bank and refreshes every day.
sourceZh: 这节课会从词汇库里自动抽取，并每天刷新。
